name: ten-women-who-changed-science-and-the-world
description: Catherine Whitlock and Rhodri Evans's Ten Women Who Changed Science — learn from ten pioneering women scientists about discovery, persistence, overcoming barriers, and leaving a lasting impact on science and humanity
useCase: Helps anyone find inspiration in the stories of ten women scientists who changed the world — from Marie Curie to Rachel Carson — and learn about systemic barriers, persistence, and the true nature of scientific discovery.
knownRisks: The book profiles ten specific women — there are many other women scientists whose stories are not covered
